rationale: Multiple network connections from an external IP (23.93.242.200) to the internal host (10.0.1.14) on destination port 3389 (RDP) are observed within a short time frame. This pattern, especially with svchost.exe as the image and NT AUTHORITY\NETWORK SERVICE as the user, strongly suggests a brute-force or dictionary attack against the RDP service. The 'initiated: false' attribute indicates the connections are inbound, further supporting an external attack attempt.
